title: Smorox Pack Assets
description: Libary Mod for Smorox Pack Projects
body:
Smorox Pack Assets is a utility mod designed primarily for the Smorox Pack modpacks.
It provides shared assets, resources, and functionality that other Smorox mods and content rely on.
While it does not add much standalone gameplay on its own, it is a core dependency that ensures compatibility, consistency, and smooth integration across the Smorox modding ecosystem.
